member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Keycloak API key authentication in ASP.NET Core.

member.name: F:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyExtensions.DefaultScheme
member.summary: Default scheme name used when none is specified.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyExtensions.AddKeycloakApiKeyAuthentication(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.AuthenticationBuilder,System.Action{EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions})
member.summary: Adds Keycloak API key authentication using the default scheme name (KeycloakApiKey) and configures options via a delegate.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyExtensions.AddKeycloakApiKeyAuthentication(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Authentication.AuthenticationBuilder,System.String,System.Action{EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions})
member.summary: Adds Keycloak API key authentication using a custom scheme name. Use this overload when registering multiple authentication schemes.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyHandler
member.summary: ASP.NET Core authentication handler that validates API keys by exchanging them for Keycloak access tokens and populating from the returned JWT claims.

member.name: F:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyHandler.RateLimitHeaderNames
member.summary: The name used to register rate-limit response headers when Keycloak returns 429.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions
member.summary: Options for the Keycloak API key authentication handler.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions.ServerUrl
member.summary: Base URL of the Keycloak server — e.g. https://auth.example.com.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions.Realm
member.summary: Keycloak realm name.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions.ClientId
member.summary: Client ID used when exchanging API keys for tokens.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions.ClientSecret
member.summary: Optional client secret (required for confidential clients).

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions.HeaderName
member.summary: HTTP header the handler reads the API key from. Defaults to X-API-Key.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions.CacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: How long (in seconds) a successfully exchanged token is cached. The handler uses the smaller of this value and the token's own expires_in field so the cache never outlives the token. Defaults to 300 seconds (5 minutes).

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenExchangeResult
member.summary: Result of a successful API key exchange.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenExchangeResult.#ctor(EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenResponse,EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo)
member.summary: Result of a successful API key exchange.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenResponse
member.summary: Raw Keycloak token endpoint response.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenResponse.AccessToken
member.summary: The JWT access token.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenResponse.ExpiresIn
member.summary: Token lifetime in seconds.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenResponse.TokenType
member.summary: Token type, typically Bearer.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenResponse.Scope
member.summary: Space-separated granted scopes.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo
member.summary: Decoded claims from the Keycloak access token.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.Sub
member.summary: Subject (user ID).

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.Azp
member.summary: Authorized party (client ID the token was issued to).

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.ApiKeyId
member.summary: ID of the API key that was exchanged.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.PreferredUsername
member.summary: Preferred username.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.Email
member.summary: Email address.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.RealmAccess
member.summary: Realm-level role assignments.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.ResourceAccess
member.summary: Client-level role assignments keyed by client ID.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.Scope
member.summary: Space-separated list of granted scopes.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.Exp
member.summary: Token expiry as a Unix timestamp.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyClaimsInfo.AdditionalClaims
member.summary: Raw additional claims not covered by typed properties.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.RealmAccess
member.summary: Roles container used by both realm_access and resource_access.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.RealmAccess.Roles
member.summary: List of role names.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.IKeycloakTokenExchangeClient
member.summary: Abstraction for the Keycloak token exchange operation. Exposed publicly so consumers can substitute a test double or custom implementation.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.IKeycloakTokenExchangeClient.ExchangeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exchanges an API key for a Keycloak access token and decoded claims.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakTokenExchangeClient
member.summary: Exchanges API keys for Keycloak access tokens via the custom grant type. Uses so connections are properly pooled and the handler lifecycle is managed by the DI container.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakTokenExchangeClient.#ctor(System.Net.Http.IHttpClientFactory,EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakApiKeyOptions)
member.summary: Exchanges API keys for Keycloak access tokens via the custom grant type. Uses so connections are properly pooled and the handler lifecycle is managed by the DI container.

member.name: F:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakTokenExchangeClient.HttpClientName
member.summary: Named HttpClient used by this handler (registered in DI by the extension method).

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.KeycloakTokenExchangeClient.ExchangeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exchanges the raw API key value for a Keycloak access token and decoded claims.
member.exception: Thrown when Keycloak returns a non-success response.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyExchangeException
member.summary: Thrown when the Keycloak token endpoint returns a non-success response.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyExchangeException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Net.Http.Headers.HttpResponseHeaders)
member.summary: Thrown when the Keycloak token endpoint returns a non-success response.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyExchangeException.StatusCode
member.summary: HTTP status code returned by Keycloak.

member.name: P:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ApiKeyExchangeException.ResponseHeaders
member.summary: Response headers from Keycloak (includes rate-limit headers on 429).

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ITokenCache`1
member.summary: Abstraction for the API key claims cache. Exposed publicly so consumers can substitute a custom implementation (e.g. distributed cache) when registering the authentication handler.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ITokenCache`1.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a cached value, or if missing or expired.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ITokenCache`1.Set(System.String,`0,System.Int32)
member.summary: Stores a value with the given TTL in seconds.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.ITokenCache`1.Clear
member.summary: Removes all entries.

member.name: T:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenCache`1
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory cache for exchanged token results. Entries are evicted lazily on access once they expire.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenCache`1.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a cached value, or if missing or expired.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenCache`1.Set(System.String,`0,System.Int32)
member.summary: Stores a value with the given TTL in seconds. Zero or negative TTL is a no-op.

member.name: M:EmDzej.KeycloakApiKeyAuthentication.TokenCache`1.Clear
member.summary: Removes all entries from the cache.
